description:
The 'TailwindTraders' repository contains a file named 'maintenance-scripts.yml' that defines critical operational tasks, but it is not currently registered as a pipeline. Create a new pipeline using the existing 'maintenance-scripts.yml' file from the 'TailwindTraders' repository. Name the pipeline 'Nightly Maintenance' and place it in a folder named 'Operations' (final path: 'Operations/Nightly Maintenance'). Run the pipeline once to verify it works. 

Credentials (if needed): 
User: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!
